title: 3 Recession-Resilient Dividend Stocks
text: Inflation and the latest CPI report are red hot, and many stocks are getting burned. Consider dividend stocks with attractive yields and dividend metrics as a recession and inflationary defense. Investors are looking for stocks that can offer income.
